videos.headline: Stuttgart beats Augsburg 2-1 with a late Waldemar Anton strike
videos.title: Stuttgart beats Augsburg 2-1 with a late Waldemar Anton strike
videos.caption: The Swabian side manages to get the better of Augsburg, courtesy of an injury time Waldermar Anton goal after a spectacular flick from substitute Tiago Tomás.
videos.description: The Swabian side manages to get the better of Augsburg, courtesy of an injury time Waldermar Anton goal after a spectacular flick from substitute Tiago Tomás.

videos.headline: Musiala, Choupo-Moting goals steer simple Bayern win
videos.title: Musiala, Choupo-Moting goals steer simple Bayern win
videos.caption: Bayern Munich eases past a listless Hoffenheim 2-0 thanks to goals from Jamal Musiala and Eric Choupo-Moting.
videos.description: Bayern Munich eases past a listless Hoffenheim 2-0 thanks to goals from Jamal Musiala and Eric Choupo-Moting.
